Find Your Court

Browse all 12 padel clubs on the Costa del Sol. Compare facilities, prices, and locations to find the perfect court for your game.

★Featured
IndoorOutdoor

NAC Nueva Alcántara

16 courts

San Pedro

€18–€28/hr

Voted World's Best Padel Club in both 2024 and 2025, NAC Nueva Alcántara is the benchmark for padel excellence on the Costa del Sol. All 16 panoramic glass-walled courts are built to World Padel Tour standards, surrounded by lush gardens and mountain views. The club offers a fine dining restaurant, physiotherapy centre, fully-stocked pro shop, and one of the most active tournament calendars on the coast.

★4.3(317)
View Details→
★Featured
Outdoor

Puente Romano Tennis, Padel & Fitness

4 courts

Marbella Centro

€24–€40/hr

One of the most exclusive addresses in European padel, Puente Romano's courts sit within the legendary Golden Mile resort where professional players and celebrities come to train. Four premium outdoor courts are complemented by a world-class coaching academy, Michelin-starred dining, and direct beach access — making every game feel like an event in itself.

★4.6(339)
View Details→
Outdoor

Manolo Santana Racquets Club

4 courts

Nueva Andalucía

€16–€26/hr

Founded in 1997 by Spain's tennis legend Manolo Santana, this prestigious club in Nueva Andalucía's Golf Valley offers 4 padel courts alongside 6 tennis courts. Regular clinics from WPT-certified coaches, a vibrant restaurant and bar, outdoor swimming pool, and an international member community make this one of the most social clubs on the coast.

★4.1(200)
View Details→
Outdoor

Club de Tenis y Pádel Bel Air

4 courts

Estepona

€12–€20/hr

A full-service sports club between Estepona and San Pedro, Bel Air offers 4 padel courts and 9 tennis courts in a relaxed family-friendly setting. With a well-regarded restaurant serving breakfast and lunch, a swimming pool, and a comprehensive coaching academy for juniors and adults, Bel Air is a genuine community club with consistently high Google reviews.

★4.6(258)
View Details→
Outdoor

Aloha Tennis & Padel Club

4 courts

Nueva Andalucía

€12–€20/hr

A well-loved padel and tennis club nestled in the Aloha residential area of Nueva Andalucía. The club has a loyal community of local and expat members, active weekly leagues, and a welcoming atmosphere that keeps players coming back. Conveniently located close to Puerto Banús with easy parking.

★4.6(61)
View Details→
Outdoor

International Tennis Club

3 courts

Marbella Centro

€12–€18/hr

A well-established multi-surface club in central Marbella offering fast hard courts, clay, and padel courts in a unique location. The International Tennis Club has long been a favourite with the international community living in and around Marbella town, combining quality facilities with a relaxed, unpretentious atmosphere.

★4.4(70)
View Details→
Outdoor

Royal Tennis Club Marbella

4 courts

Marbella Este

€10–€18/hr

Internationally renowned tennis and padel club set in the El Rosario area, just 800 metres from the beach. Royal Tennis offers training programmes for all ages — from Mini Tennis for 4–6 year olds to competitive adult coaching — plus padel courts, a pool, and free parking. A great-value option on the eastern side of Marbella.

★4.2(301)
View Details→
★Featured
Outdoor

Rafa Nadal Tennis Center Marbella

6 courts

Marbella Este

€20–€35/hr

The Marbella outpost of Rafa Nadal's global academy network, bringing world-class coaching methodology to the Costa del Sol. The centre offers high-performance training camps and individual lessons on premium clay and hard courts, with racket sports including padel. A must-visit for serious players who want to train in the Nadal Academy tradition.

★4.8(51)
View Details→
IndoorOutdoor

Los Naranjos Padel Club

18 courts

Puerto Banús

€14–€22/hr

The largest padel club in Andalusia, just five minutes from Puerto Banús marina. Los Naranjos boasts 18 courts across indoor and outdoor settings — including one World Padel Tour competition court, four fully covered indoor courts, and a dedicated solo practice facility. With a professional coaching academy and pickleball courts added in 2024, this is the most comprehensive padel destination on the Costa del Sol.

View Details→
Outdoor

Villa Padierna Racquet Club

15 courts

Estepona

€22–€38/hr

The most luxurious padel experience on the Costa del Sol. Fifteen courts spread across three areas within the grounds of the five-star Villa Padierna Palace hotel. Five-star service extends to every aspect of play — private coaching, bespoke racket fitting, and post-match spa treatments are all on offer.

View Details→
★Featured
Outdoor

Real Club Padel Marbella

6 courts

Marbella Centro

€14–€22/hr

Marbella's most vibrant padel community. Real Club Padel Marbella combines six next-generation courts with an on-site gym and spa. Weekly leagues, ladies' sessions, and junior development programmes run year-round — making this the natural choice for players who want great padel and great company in central Marbella.

View Details→
Outdoor

Los Monteros Racket Club

6 courts

Marbella Este

€12–€20/hr

Tucked within the exclusive Los Monteros estate east of Marbella town, this elegant racket club offers six glass padel courts in a tranquil beachside setting. Popular with residents of the surrounding villas and guests at the Kimpton Los Monteros hotel, the club has a genuine members feel with friendly staff and competitive rates.

View Details→
PadelMarbella

Your complete guide to padel on the Costa del Sol. We review clubs, track tournaments, and help you find and book the perfect court in Marbella and surrounding areas.
